title: Wasp Removal in Jericho, Long Island | $350-$550

intro: Dealing with aggressive wasps around your Jericho property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe wasp removal services throughout Jericho and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians eliminate wasp nests from residential and commercial properties, ensuring your family and customers can enjoy outdoor spaces without fear of stings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Jericho homeowners and businesses for years with reliable, same-day wasp removal services. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to safely eliminate nests while protecting your property, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee that keeps your Jericho location wasp-free.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined neighborhoods and well-maintained properties around the Jericho School District and near landmarks like the Milleridge Inn provide ideal nesting spots for yellow jackets, paper wasps, and hornets. The area's mix of classic colonials, modern developments, and commercial properties along Jericho Turnpike often experience wasp activity in eaves, attics, and landscaped areas during warmer months.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Jericho range from $350 to $550 depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing after a quick assessment and offer same-day service for most Jericho properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service throughout Jericho and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours. Most wasp nest removals are completed in a single visit lasting 30-60 minutes.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Jericho, NY?
faqs.answer: Jericho properties commonly see yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. These species build nests in trees, under eaves, in attics, and underground, becoming particularly aggressive in late summer when colonies are largest.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my Jericho home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use professional-grade treatments that effectively eliminate wasps while being safe for your family, pets, and property. We follow all safety protocols and can schedule treatments at times that minimize disruption to your household.
